title: Manufacturing Engineer - UltraTech Cement - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - UltraTech Cement - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
UltraTech Cement is actively seeking a talented and motivated Manufacturing Engineer to join our dynamic team in Ludhiana. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About UltraTech Cement:
UltraTech Cement is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in APQP

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with UltraTech Cement!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
